summary: Extended SNMP Metrics Testing Complete - All tests passed. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI features verified working. Extended metrics (CPU, Memory, Temperature) display correctly in gauge widgets. Hardware health section (fans, PSUs, temperatures, disks) renders correctly for HPE ILO devices. Port traffic data with IN/OUT bandwidth and errors displays in expandable table.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/connector/device-poll-status returns extended fields (cpu_usage, memory_usage, temperature, device_class, hardware)
POST /api/connector/device-report accepts HPE 5130 switch extended metrics (CPU, Memory, Temp, ports with traffic)
POST /api/connector/device-report accepts HPE ILO hardware health data (fans, PSUs, temps, disks)
GET /api/connector/device-metrics/{device_ip} returns empty array for unknown device
POST /api/connector/device-report handles null extended fields gracefully
POST /api/connector/device-report updates existing device data correctly
Existing SNMP device data returned correctly
Existing PING device data returned correctly
frontend_ui_tests: Connectors page loads with client groups
Device rows display with SNMP/PING type badges
DeviceDetailPanel renders when device is expanded
Extended metrics section displays CPU/RAM/Temp gauge widgets
Gauge widgets show correct values (CPU 45%, RAM 62%, Temp 38C)
Port status grid displays UP/DOWN ports with color coding
Traffic table shows IN/OUT bandwidth and errors
HPE Comware Switch class label displays correctly
Hardware health section displays for ILO devices
Temperature sensors section shows CPU temps
Fans section shows fan status and speed
Power supplies section shows PSU status
DEGRADATO (degraded) health status badge displays correctly
HPE iLO Server class label displays correctly

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_extended_snmp_metrics.py (new test file for extended SNMP metrics)
seed_data_creation: Test devices created during testing: 10.99.99.1-5 (HPE switch tests), 10.99.99.100 (HPE ILO test). All test data cleaned up after tests. Extended metrics sent to existing device 192.168.1.2 for frontend testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Extended SNMP metrics feature fully verified. Backend endpoints: device-report (accepts cpu_usage, memory_usage, temperature, device_class, hardware with fans/disks/temps/power_supplies), device-poll-status (returns all extended fields), device-metrics/{ip} (returns historical metrics for trending). Frontend: DeviceDetailPanel component renders GaugeWidget for CPU/RAM/Temp, HwStatusBadge for hardware health, PortTrafficRow for port traffic. The connector is currently at v1.7.5 and hasn't sent extended data yet - extended metrics will appear when connector is updated to v1.8.0+.

feature_verification.feature: Extended SNMP Metrics for HPE 5130 Switches and HPE ILO Servers
